name: Peanut Butter S'mores
recipeIngredient: 2 1.6 oz Packa chocolate covered Peanut Butter Cups (unwrapped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place one peanut butter cup on each of four crackers.
2. Spear the marshmallows on a long fork or clean stick.
3. Toast the marshmallows over campfire coals or grill on low heat.
4. Place the toasted marshmallow on top of each peanut butter cup.
5. Top each dessert with a cracker.
6. Press together and hold in place.
